summary: Add benchmark bonus scoring (T12) and cost-efficiency factor (T13) to ModelRouter._scoreModel(). BENCHMARK_SCORES registry with HumanEval/MBPP pass@1 for 16 models. _applyBenchmarkBonus() gives 0-0.15 supplementary bonus. _applyCostEfficiency() uses TokenCostCalculator pricing for 0-0.05 cost bonus. Neither changes existing scoring weights.
